info.name: MessManagerOS API (v1)
info.description: Complete Postman collection for MessManagerOS API. 85+ requests covering all modules: auth, users, mess, mess-member, payments, expenses, billing, meals, meal-off-requests, utility-bills, market-schedules, menu-plans, ai-shopping, notices, complaints, reports, subscriptions, and admin.

item.name: Auth

request.description: Role: Public. Body: { fullName (string, required), email (string, required), password (string, min 6, required), phone (string, optional) }

response.name: Register (Public)
response.body:
{
    "success": true,
    "message": "User registered. Please check email for OTP.",
    "data": {
        "fullName": "Nurulla Hasan",
        "email": "nurullahasan.dev@gmail.com",
        "phone": "01700000000",
        "isEmailVerified": false,
        "isPhoneVerified": false,
        "status": "active",
        "globalRole": "user",
        "verificationOtpExpiresAt": "2026-04-04T04:48:52.258Z",
        "lastOtpSentAt": "2026-04-04T04:38:52.258Z",
        "createdAt": "2026-04-04T04:38:52.264Z",
        "updatedAt": "2026-04-04T04:38:52.264Z",
        "id": "69d095dcc68e4c2c26877d3d"
    }
}

exec: try { const json = pm.response.json(); const token = json?.data?.accessToken; if (token) { pm.collectionVariables.set('accessToken', token); console.log('Token saved to collection variable'); } } catch (e) { console.error('Failed to parse token', e); }

request.description: Role: Public. Rate limited. Body: { email (string, required), password (string, required) }. Returns accessToken in response, refreshToken in HTTP-only cookie.

header.value: refreshToken=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJ1c2VySWQiOiI2OWQwOTVkY2M2OGU0YzJjMjY4NzdkM2QiLCJnbG9iYWxSb2xlIjoidXNlciIsImlhdCI6MTc3NTI3Nzc4NCwiZXhwIjoxNzc1ODgyNTg0fQ.PiSUoYKRp2lwippeMFrO0DJKLwL7PMZFBcIy7YjSiPw; Max-Age=604800; Path=/; Expires=Sat, 11 Apr 2026 04:43:04 GMT; HttpOnly; SameSite=Lax

request.description: Role: Public. Rate limited. Body: { email (string, required), otp (string, length 6, required) }

response.name: Verify Email (Public)
response.body:
{
    "success": true,
    "message": "Email verified successfully",
    "data": {
        "fullName": "Nurulla Hasan",
        "email": "nurullahasan.dev@gmail.com",
        "phone": "01700000000",

        "id": "69d095dcc68e4c2c26877d3d"
    }
}

request.description: Role: Public. Strict rate limited. Body: { email (string, required) }
Role: Public (requires valid refreshToken in HTTP-only cookie). Returns new accessToken. Postman automatically sends cookies.

header.value: refreshToken=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJ1c2VySWQiOiI2OWQwOTVkY2M2OGU0YzJjMjY4NzdkM2QiLCJnbG9iYWxSb2xlIjoidXNlciIsImlhdCI6MTc3NTI3NzkxMywiZXhwIjoxNzc1ODgyNzEzfQ.piLQoFBe_tyKzHXCsvsxM_EL0WQaN4k07IKSyMRLkJg; Max-Age=604800; Path=/; Expires=Sat, 11 Apr 2026 04:45:13 GMT; HttpOnly; SameSite=Lax

request.description: Role: Public. Clears refreshToken cookie on server side.
Role: Public. Rate limited. Body: { email (string, required) }
Role: Public. Rate limited. Body: { email (string, required), otp (string, length 6, required) }

response.name: Verify Reset OTP (Public)

request.description: Role: Public. Rate limited. Body: { email (string, required), otp (string, length 6, required), newPassword (string, min 6, required) }
Role: Auth (requires bearer token). Body: { oldPassword (string, required), newPassword (string, min 6, required) }

item.description: Authentication endpoints. Public routes require no auth. Change password requires authentication.

item.name: Users

request.description: Role: Auth. Returns current user profile.
Role: Auth. Body: { fullName (string, optional), phone (string, optional), address (string, optional), bio (string, max 500 chars, optional) }
Role: Auth. Upload avatar image file (JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF). Max 5MB. Form field name: 'avatar'

item.description: User profile management. All routes require authentication.

item.name: Messes

request.description: Role: Manager/Super Admin only. Creates new mess and sets creator as manager. Requires platform-level manager or super_admin role. Body schema: any (placeholder validation)
Role: Auth. Joins mess using invite code. Body schema: any (placeholder validation)
Role: Member+ (Manager/Member). Returns mess details. Requires messId variable.
Role: Manager only. Body schema: any (placeholder validation). Requires messId variable.
Role: Manager only. Generates new invite code for mess. Requires messId variable.
Role: Manager only. Transfers manager role to another member. Body schema: any (placeholder validation). Requires messId and memberId variables.

item.description: Mess management. Create, join, update mess. All routes require authentication. Routes under /:messId require mess membership (Manager or Member).

item.name: Mess Members

request.description: Role: Member+. Lists all mess members. Requires messId variable.
Role: Manager. Approves pending join request. Requires messId and memberId variables.
Role: Manager. Rejects pending join request. Requires messId and memberId variables.
Role: Manager. Removes member from mess. Requires messId and memberId variables.

item.description: Member management within a mess. Note: These routes don't explicitly enforce manager role in route file - parent mess context applies.

item.name: Payments

request.description: Role: Member+. Lists all payments in mess. Requires messId variable.
Role: Member+. Creates payment record. Body: { messMemberId (ObjectId, required), amount (number, positive, required), method (string, required), reference (string, optional) }
Role: Member+. Lists current user's payments. Requires messId variable.
Role: Member+. Gets payment details. Requires messId and paymentId variables.
Role: Manager. Approves pending payment. Requires messId and paymentId variables.
Role: Manager. Rejects pending payment. Requires messId and paymentId variables.
Role: Member+. Cancels own payment. Requires messId and paymentId variables.

item.description: Payment management. Members can create payments, managers can approve/reject.

item.name: Expenses

request.description: Role: Member+. Lists all expenses. Requires messId variable.

Role: Member+. Body: { category (string, required), amount (number, positive, required), date (ISO datetime, required), paidBy (ObjectId, required), fundSource ('mess_cash'|'personal_cash', required), receiptUrl (URL, optional) }
Role: Member+. Gets expense details. Requires messId and expenseId variables.
Role: Manager. Approves expense. Requires messId and expenseId variables.
Role: Manager. Rejects expense. Requires messId and expenseId variables.
Role: Manager. Marks expense as reimbursed. Requires messId and expenseId variables.
Role: Member+. Deletes/cancels own expense. Requires messId and expenseId variables.

item.description: Expense tracking. Members can create expenses, managers approve/reject/reimburse.

item.name: Billing

request.description: Role: Member+. Lists billing cycles. Requires messId variable.
Role: Member+. Gets bills for specific cycle. Requires messId and billingCycleId variables.
Role: Manager. Previews billing without saving. Body: { month (number 1-12, required), year (number, required) }
Role: Manager. Finalizes and saves billing cycle. Body: { month (number 1-12, required), year (number, required) }
Role: Manager. Reopens finalized billing cycle for corrections. Requires messId and billingCycleId variables.

item.description: Billing cycle management. Managers preview and finalize monthly billing.

item.name: Meals

request.description: Role: Member+. Lists meal records. Requires messId variable.
Role: Manager. Logs meal for member. Body: { messMemberId (ObjectId, required), date (ISO datetime, required), mealCount (number >=0, required) }

item.description: Meal logging. Managers log meals for members.

item.name: Meal Off Requests

request.description: Role: Member+. Lists meal off requests. Requires messId variable.
Role: Member+. Creates meal off request. Body: { messMemberId (ObjectId, required), startDate (string, required), endDate (string, required), reason (string, optional) }
Role: Manager. Approves meal off request. Requires messId and requestId variables.
Role: Manager. Rejects meal off request. Requires messId and requestId variables.

item.description: Meal off request management. Members create requests, managers approve/reject.

item.name: Utility Bills

request.description: Role: Member+. Lists utility bills. Requires messId variable.

Role: Manager. Creates utility bill. Body: { category (string, required), amount (number, positive, required), billingMonth (number 1-12, required), year (number, required), dueDate (ISO datetime, optional) }
Role: Manager. Marks utility bill as paid. Requires messId and billId variables.

item.description: Utility bill tracking. Managers create bills and mark as paid.

item.name: Market Schedules

request.description: Role: Member+. Lists market schedules. Requires messId variable.
Role: Member+. Lists current user's market duties. Requires messId variable.

Role: Manager. Body: { assignedTo (ObjectId[], min 1, required), targetDate (ISO datetime, required), shoppingItems (array of {name, quantity}, required), estimatedBudget (number, positive, required) }
Role: Manager. Body: { assignedTo (ObjectId[], optional), shoppingItems (array, optional), estimatedBudget (number, optional) }. Requires messId and scheduleId variables.
Role: Manager. Reassigns schedule to different member(s). Body: { assignedTo (ObjectId[], min 1, required) }. Requires messId and scheduleId variables.
Role: Member+. Updates actual amount spent. Body: { actualSpent (number >=0, required) }. Requires messId and scheduleId variables.

Role: Member+. Completes market schedule and creates expense. Body: { actualSpent (number, positive, required), actorMessMemberId (ObjectId, required), fundSource ('mess_cash'|'personal_cash', required) }
Role: Manager. Voids/cancels market schedule. Requires messId and scheduleId variables.

item.description: Market duty scheduling. Managers create schedules, assigned members complete them.

item.name: Menu Plans

request.description: Role: Member+. Lists menu plans. Requires messId variable.
Role: Member+. Gets menu plan by date. Path param: date (YYYY-MM-DD). Requires messId variable.
Role: Member+. Gets menu plan by ID. Requires messId and planId variables.
Role: Manager. Body: { date (ISO datetime, required), meals (object with breakfast/lunch/dinner strings, optional), isAiGenerated (boolean, default false, optional) }
Role: Manager. Body: { meals (object with breakfast/lunch/dinner strings, optional) }. Requires messId and planId variables.
Role: Manager. Publishes menu plan. Requires messId and planId variables.
Role: Manager. Archives menu plan. Requires messId and planId variables.

item.description: Menu planning. Managers create/publish/archive meal plans.

item.name: AI Shopping

request.description: Role: Member+. Lists AI shopping lists. Requires messId variable.

item.name: Get AI Shopping List By Id (Member+)

request.description: Role: Member+. Gets AI shopping list by ID. Requires messId and listId variables.
Role: Manager. Generates shopping list from menu plan. Body: { menuPlanId (ObjectId, required), targetDate (ISO datetime, required) }
Role: Manager. Approves AI shopping list. Requires messId and listId variables.
Role: Manager. Rejects AI shopping list. Requires messId and listId variables.
Role: Manager. Converts AI list to market schedule. Body: { assignedTo (ObjectId[], min 1, required), estimatedBudget (number, positive, required) }

item.description: AI-generated shopping lists from menu plans.

item.name: Notices

request.description: Role: Member+. Lists notices. Requires messId variable.
Role: Member+. Gets notice by ID. Requires messId and noticeId variables.
Role: Manager. Body: { title (string, required), content (string, required), isPinned (boolean, optional) }
Role: Manager. Body: { title (string, optional), content (string, optional), isPinned (boolean, optional), status ('active'|'archived', optional) }
Role: Manager. Pins notice to top. Requires messId and noticeId variables.
Role: Manager. Archives notice. Requires messId and noticeId variables.

item.description: Notice board management. Managers create/update/pin notices.

item.name: Complaints

request.description: Role: Member+. Lists all complaints. Requires messId variable.
Role: Member+. Lists current user's complaints. Requires messId variable.
Role: Member+. Gets complaint by ID. Requires messId and complaintId variables.
Role: Member+. Creates complaint. Body: { title (string, required), description (string, required) }
Role: Manager. Updates complaint status. Body: { status ('in_progress', required) }
Role: Manager. Resolves complaint. Body: { resolvedNote (string, optional) }
Role: Manager. Rejects complaint. Body: { resolvedNote (string, optional) }

item.description: Complaint management. Members create complaints, managers update status/resolve/reject.

item.name: Reports

request.description: Role: Member+. Gets mess summary report. Requires messId variable.
Role: Member+. Gets monthly financial report. Query params: month, year. Requires messId variable.
Role: Member+. Gets individual member statement. Requires messId and memberId variables.
Role: Member+. Gets expenses report. Query params: startDate, endDate. Requires messId variable.
Role: Member+. Gets payments report. Query params: startDate, endDate. Requires messId variable.
Role: Manager. Exports report as CSV. Query params: month, year. Requires messId variable.
Role: Manager. Exports report as PDF. Query params: month, year. Requires messId variable.

item.description: Reporting and analytics. Managers can export data.

item.name: Subscriptions

request.description: Role: Public. Lists available subscription plans (no authentication required).
Role: Manager. Gets current mess subscription. Requires messId variable.
Role: Manager. Gets subscription history. Requires messId variable.
Role: Manager. Starts free trial. Requires messId variable.
Role: Manager. Subscribes to plan. Body: { planId (string, required), paymentToken (string, required) }
Role: Manager. Cancels subscription. Requires messId variable.

item.description: Subscription management. Global plans are public. Mess subscriptions require manager role.

item.name: Admin (Super Admin)

request.description: Role: Super Admin. Lists all users. Query params: page, limit.
Role: Super Admin. Lists all messes. Query params: page, limit.
Role: Super Admin. Gets platform statistics.
Role: Super Admin. Updates user global role. Body: { globalRole ('user'|'manager'|'super_admin', required) }. Requires userId variable.
Role: Super Admin. Blocks user account. Requires userId variable.
Role: Super Admin. Suspends mess. Requires messId variable.

item.description: Platform administration. Strictly restricted to super_admin global role.
